name: 7 Layer Jello
recipeIngredient: 4 pkg Jello, 3 oz each, different colors
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix condensed milk with 1 cup hot water.
2. Mix 2 packages Knox gelatin with 1 cup hot water.
3. Combine the two mixtures.
4. In separate bowls, mix each Jello package with 1 Knox package and 1 cup hot water (total of 4 mixtures).
5. Refrigerate after each layer:
- First layer: Jello, approximately 15 minutes
- Second layer: 1/3 of the condensed milk mixture (about 1 cup), approximately 15 minutes
- Third layer: remaining Jello, a little less time
- Fourth layer: 1/3 of the condensed milk mixture, less time
- Fifth to seventh layers: continue with the remaining mixtures, each a little less time.
6. Ensure gelatin is solid enough that the layers don't mix together but not so chilled that they don't stick together.
